comment.body:
My experience to get some core knowledge:

1. Learn basic greeks (delta, gamma, vega) by ourselves. Unlimited resources from Google or AI or Youtube.
2. Learn advanced greeks, GEX, etc. by reading Alma's educational posts and chats in Feb 3~6-ish. (Alma also explained why naive GEX is wrong there).
3. Some basic knowledge from OptionDepth: https://optionsdepth.com/articles/
comment.raw_body:

2. Learn advanced greeks, GEX, etc. by reading Alma's educational posts and chats in Feb 3~6-ish. (Alma also explained why naive GEX is wrong there).
3. Some basic knowledge from OptionDepth: https://optionsdepth.com/articles/
